brand.name: New Look Beauty Parlour
brand.location: Akividu, West Godavari, Andhra Pradesh, India

typography.strategy: The Old Money Tech (Classic Serif Head + Sterile Mono/Sans Body)
typography.guidelines: Headings must use Playfair Display with tight tracking. Use italic accents for subheadings or specific words inside headings to add high-class refinement.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use Optical Clarity strategy. High opacity backgrounds (bg-black/60) with heavy blur (backdrop-blur-2xl), 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/10).
visual_enhancers.shadows: Diffuse ambient shadow. shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(212,175,55,0.05)] in dark mode.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders using the defined border colors to create crisp separation. Use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for cards.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. The site must feel weighty and premium.

animations.hero_reveal: Masked line-by-line reveal for the H1. Elements fade and slide up slowly.
animations.marquee: Slow editorial marquee for services. Very smooth drift. Minimalist typography.
animations.hover_states: Images inside cards scale up slightly (scale-105) on hover with a slow transition (duration-700).
animations.parallax: Use subtle vertical parallax on large imagery in the About/Why Choose Us sections.

layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24, p-32. Minimum gap-8 for grids.
layouts.hero: Cinematic Kinetic Hero. Large background image or video with dark overlay (bg-black/40). Masked typography in the center or left-aligned. Multiple CTAs (Book Appointment, WhatsApp, Call, Map).
layouts.about_manifesto: Numbered Manifesto Chapters. Asymmetric layout with large sticky numbering on the left and content on the right.
layouts.services_grid: Bento or Asymmetric Grid. Mixing tall (row-span-2) and wide cards. Hover choreography reveals 'Book Now' button.
layouts.gallery: Instagram-style masonry or structured high-density grid. No gaps or 1px gaps for a seamless editorial look.
layouts.contact: Split layout: Contact info & Google Maps on the left, appointment form on the right. Form uses shadcn/ui with customized luxury styling.

hero_bride.description: Luxury Indian bride, highly cinematic for the hero section.

facial_treatment.description: Woman receiving a luxury spa facial mask.

hair_styling.description: Professional hairstyling in a luxury salon.

products_display.description: Luxury beauty cosmetic products display in modern store.

components_and_features.sticky_nav: Glassmorphism header, sticky at top, z-50. Must include brand name in Playfair Display, key links, and 'Book Now' CTA.
components_and_features.floating_ctas: Fixed bottom-right buttons for WhatsApp and Call. Must be styled with the primary/gold color.
components_and_features.appointment_form: Shadcn/UI based. Inputs should have subtle bottom borders or very light rounded backgrounds. Must save to backend + trigger WhatsApp redirect.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure gold/rose gold text meets minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio against dark backgrounds. Use text-shadow if necessary over images.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="book-appointment-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install framer-motion and lenis for smooth scrolling and animations.
Ensure dark mode is the default, with a working toggle for light mode.
Use Playfair Display for headings and Inter for body text.
Implement the Cinematic Kinetic Hero with a masked line-by-line reveal using framer-motion.
Create an Editorial Marquee using framer-motion or a marquee library.
Build the Services Grid with hover choreography (images scaling up, buttons appearing).
Develop the Instagram-style Gallery using a dense masonry or CSS grid.
Implement floating WhatsApp and Call CTA buttons.
Ensure the Appointment form integrates with Shadcn components, custom styled to fit the luxury theme.
DO NOT use pure transparent backgrounds for the sticky header—use the defined glassmorphism strategy.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Do not make generic centered layouts or simplistic uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Do NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Add transitions to specific properties to avoid breaking transforms.
Do NOT center align the app container in global CSS.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯).
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, parallax).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Use the provided image URLs. NEVER use placeholder text or URLs.
Prioritize reusing Shadcn components from src/components/ui.
